input.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts
- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that imports and registers router implementations, extends HonoBase class
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
- Simple note: Primary class file that wires together the router choices for Hono framework

## src/hono-base.ts
- Purpose: Base class implementation containing method routing, path handling, middleware stack, request processing and compose function integration
- Names noticed: HonoBase, Router, Context, Compose, Methods, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HonoOptions, mount, basePath, router match, errorHandler, compose
- Simple note: Core functionality for routing, path resolution, middleware execution, and request/response handling

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module barrel file that exports PatternRouter from the router module
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, index
- Simple note: Clean export interface for pattern routing implementation

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Pattern-based router implementation using compiled route patterns with regex flags, method matching and query parameter extraction
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, pattern, exec, wildcard, endsWith
- Simple note: Converts route definitions to compiled regex patterns for fast matching with parameter extraction

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module barrel file that exports LinearRouter from the router module
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, index
- Simple note: Clean export interface for linear string-based routing implementation

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Linear string comparison router that processes paths by splitting at path segments and matching character-by-character with optional parameter handling
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Params, Result, Router, checkOptionalParameter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, indexOf, hasStar, hasLabel, lookahead
- Simple note: Processes routes as linear strings with split segments and handles wildcards using indexOf for matching

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module barrel file that exports RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter from the router module
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, index
- Simple note: Exports regex-based router classes with preparation utilities for serialization

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Primary regex router that uses Trie-based compilation to build matching regular expressions for static and dynamic routes
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Trie, matcher, handlerData, staticMap, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, paramIndexMap, paramAssoc, buildRegExp, match
- Simple note: Builds a compilation trie from routes then generates optimized regex patterns for all supported routes

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
- Purpose: Matcher interface and implementation that provides regex matching logic with static map lookup and parameter index mapping
- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, ParamIndexMap, Result, emptyParam, match, indices, exec
- Simple note: Defines matcher type and implements matching logic to combine regex matching with static map for optimization

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
- Purpose: Prepared router that pre-builds matchers and creates relocation mapping for optimized runtime dispatch
- Names notice: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RelocateMap, match, staticMap, handlerData, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, matchers
- Simple note: Precompiles all matchers and builds relocation map for fast method-based routing without trie traversal

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
- Purpose: Trie node implementation for pattern-based route building with wildcard handling and pattern tokenization
- Names noticed: Node, Context, PARAM, WILDCARD, LABEL, TOKEN, WILDCARD_TAIL, paramAssoc, children, keys, patterns, tokens
- Simple note: Trie node class supporting labeled paths, wildcards, and pattern matching tokens with associative parameter arrays

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
- Purpose: Trie data structure implementation for organizing route patterns before regex compilation
- Names noticed: Trie, buildRegExp, group, mark, original, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, tokens, match, replace, exec
- Simple note: Builds a trie structure from route paths and generates replacement maps for index and parameter mapping during regex generation

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module barrel file that exports SmartRouter from the router module
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, index
- Simple note: Clean export interface for smart routing implementation

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Delegating router that wraps multiple routers and switches between them based on runtime capability detection
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, routers, routes, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, addRouter, use
- Simple note: Router-of-routers that delegates to internal routers and detects capability mismatches

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Module barrel file that exports TrieRouter from the router module
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, index
- Simple note: Clean export interface for trie-based routing implementation

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Trie-based router using a Node structure for path segmentation with optional and wildcard route support
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, Result, Router, checkOptionalParameter, children, patterns, params, search, methods, getPattern
- Simple note: Uses trie traversal with checkOptionalParameter to handle optional segments and wildcard matching

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
- Purpose: Trie node with handler sets and parameter tracking for method-based routing and complex pattern matching
- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, search, possibleKeys, score, wildcard, methods, children, patterns, params, match, getPattern, splitPath
- Simple note: Complex node structure with method handlers, parameter sets, possible key tracking, and weighted scoring for best match

## src/router/common.case.test.ts
- Purpose: Shared test utilities providing test suite hierarchy extraction and router matching test runner with skip support
- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, runTest, match, task, suite, skip, matchRes, stash, res, entry, posts, comments, wildcard, wildcard-abc, wildcard-efg
- Simple note: Centralized test infrastructure that provides common test cases applicable to all router implementations

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: Test file for PatternRouter using common.test case suite and testing specific unsupported path behavior
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, match, res, GET, /book, /products
- Simple note: Basic test coverage for pattern router with focus on route registration and matching

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: Test file for LinearRouter using common test cases and testing product listing route behavior
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, match, GET, /products/list, /products
- Simple note: Test coverage using common suites with linear router specific validation

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: Comprehensive test file for RegExpRouter including parameter extraction, wildcard handling, and optimization verification
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PARAM_STASH, ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, match, res, stash, /posts, /wild, /v1, /long/prefix, /all
- Simple note: Full test coverage including param stash verification, optimization checks, and edge cases

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: Test file for SmartRouter that delegates to RegExpRouter and TrieRouter implementations
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, match
- Simple note: Basic delegation test using internal RegExpRouter and TrieRouter

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: Test file for TrieRouter using common test suite
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest
- Simple note: Thin test layer using shared common cases

## Cross-File Checklist
- pattern-router: Uses compiled regex patterns for fast static/dynamic routing with parameter extraction
- linear-router: String-based linear matching with segment-by-segment comparison and wildcard support
- reg-exp-router: Trie compilation followed by regex generation with matcher optimization and static map lookup
- smart-router: Router aggregator that delegates to configured child routers with capability detection
- trie-router: Node-based trie traversal with hierarchical pattern matching and method handlers
